title: Create Compat for Dye Depot
description: Adds new Create Mod seats & Create: Interiors chairs for each of the 16 new dyes in Dye Depot
body:
# This addon has been superseded by [Dye the World](https://modrinth.com/mod/dye-the-world)! **Please use Dye the World instead of this resource pack for more complete compatibility :)** ### **⠀** ### **⠀** ### **⠀** ### Create-Dye Depot Compat Resource Pack

Addon for Create + Create: Interiors adding compatibility with Dye Depot, a mod that adds 16 new dye colors.
